---
title: "Volcano Plot"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r}
daaResults = readRDS('../datasets/fish_daa_results_df.rds')
meta = readRDS('../datasets/ps_filtered.rds') %>% .@sam_data %>% data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column('sample_name')

```

```{r}
hindgut = meta %>% filter(sample_type %in% c('hindgut'))
samp_name = select(hindgut, sample_name)
plot = cross_join(samp_name, daaResults) ## CHECK IS THIS RIGHT
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = plot, aes(x=log2_fold_change, y = -log10(p_values)))+
  geom_point()
```
